video.name: This Story Will Change Your Life _ Buddhism In English.mp4

audio.summary:
Speech:
0:00-0:20 Once, a student monk went to his master and said, 'Master, I can't live in this temple anymore. I want to leave this place and go to a peaceful and quiet monastery.' Then the master monk asked, 'Why? What's wrong with this temple? Tell me what happened.'
0:20-0:40 Then the student monk said, "See, everyone in this temple is toxic to me. There are some monks who are too much into politics in this temple. And there are some other monks who always talk negative stuff about me and others." And there are some other...
0:40-1:00 I don't think that I can practice my spiritual life in this temple. Please let me go to a peaceful and quiet monastery where there are no toxic people around me.
1:00-1:20 Then the master monk said, 'OK, I will let you go, but before you go, you have to do me a favor for the last time.' Then the student monk said, 'Tell me, master, what should I do for you?' Then the master monk took a full spoonful of water.
1:20-1:40 and gave it to the student monk and said, 'You must carry this full spoonful of water around the monastery and you should bring it to me. But here's the trick: You must never spill a single drop of water from it. If you can do it, I will'.
2:00-2:20 Master, I did it! I carried this full bucket of water around the monastery without spilling a drop!
2:20-2:40 So now, let me go to a peaceful monastery. Then the master monk said, 'Okay, my student, you are free to go. But before you go, just tell me one thing: While you were carrying the full pot of water around the monastery, did you hear any of the monks?'
2:40-3:00 Did you ever hear any of the monks talking about politics? Did you hear any of the monks gossiping about other people? Did you hear any of the monks talking negative stuff about you? Then the student monk said, 'Master, I was focused on the spoon and I didn't have any time to listen to all those noises.'
3:00-3:20 Then the master monk said, 'See, my student, if you are fully focused on your goal and if you are fully focused on your purpose, you don't have time to listen to all those negative noises around you. Remember, wherever you go in this world,'
3:20-3:40 In this world, you will meet negative people around you. But if you are fully focused on your goal and on your larger purpose, all the negative people and the negative words you hear are just noises.
3:40-4:00 It is all about what we focus on in our lives. The more we focus on other people's behaviors, words, and lives, there will be many toxic people around us. But if we focus on ourselves, our goals, and our purpose, all will be well.
Background sounds:
1:40-2:00 background sound
